de:
Die Verfolgungsjagd im Autobau beginnt mit der „Rakete“. Am 27. April eröffnete der San Francisco Palace of Fine Arts, ein jahrhundertealtes Wahrzeichen der Vereinigten Staaten, eine Technologiekonferenz.
 Hier beginnt die globale Einführungswoche von Zhumi Technology mit dem Thema „DREAME NEXT“. Besonders auffällig sind die beiden Feststoffraketentriebwerke am Heck des roten Supersportwagens auf dem Stand. Hierbei handelt es sich um die Nebula NEXT 01 JET Edition, die vom „Starry Sky Project“ entwickelt wurde und in der Branche als „Raketenauto“ bezeichnet wird. 
 Von F&E-Leitern von Automobilunternehmen über Supply-Chain-Praktiker bis hin zu Branchenanalysten sind alle Augen darauf gerichtet. 
 Dieses Raketenauto ist mit einem exklusiven, maßgeschneiderten dualen Feststoffraketen-Boostsystem ausgestattet, das eine sofortige Reaktion von 150 Millisekunden und einen maximalen Schub von 100 Kilonewton erreichen kann, was nahe an dem Schub eines einzelnen Boeing 737-Triebwerks liegt. Das Fahrzeug beschleunigt in nur 0,9 Sekunden von null auf 100 Kilometer.
title: 追觅造车，从“火箭”开始
description:
4月27日，旧金山艺术宫，这座美国百年历史地标迎来了一场科技发布会。
 追觅科技以“DREAME NEXT”为主题的全球发布会周在此开幕，展台上那台红色超跑的尾部，两个固体火箭推进器格外醒目。这便是追觅“星空计划”重磅打造的Nebula NEXT 01 JET Edition，业内称其为“火箭车”。 
 从车企研发负责人到供应链从业者再到行业分析师，目光都聚焦于此。 
 这款火箭车搭载专属定制双固体火箭助推系统，可实现150毫秒瞬时响应，最大推力100千牛，与波音737单台发动机的推力接近，车辆零百加速仅需0.9…
en:
Chasing car building starts with the "Rocket". On April 27, the San Francisco Palace of Fine Arts, a century-old landmark in the United States, ushered in a technology conference.
 Zhumi Technology's global launch week with the theme of "DREAME NEXT" opens here. The two solid rocket thrusters on the rear of the red supercar on the booth are particularly eye-catching. This is the Nebula NEXT 01 JET Edition, which was created by the "Starry Sky Project" and is called the "rocket car" in the industry. 
 From car company R&D leaders to supply chain practitioners to industry analysts, all eyes are focused on this. 
 This rocket car is equipped with an exclusive custom-made dual solid rocket boosting system, which can achieve an instantaneous response of 150 milliseconds and a maximum thrust of 100 kilonewtons, which is close to the thrust of a single Boeing 737 engine. The vehicle accelerates from zero to 100 kilometers in only 0.9...
la:

 Zhumi Technologiae globalis Lorem septimana cum themate "SOMNI NEXT" hic aperit. Duo solidi erucae in tergo supercar rubri in umbraculo trusores sunt praecipue oculi apprehensionis. Haec est Nebula NEBULA DEINDE 01 JET Edition, quae a "Stellaria Sky Project" creata est et "carro eruca" industriae appellatur. 
 Ex comitatu currus R&D duces ut catenam medicorum ad analystam industriam praebeant, oculi omnes in hoc notantur. 
 Haec raeda eruca cum consuetudine solida eruca boosting systema solida facta instructa est, quae instantaneae responsionis 150 millium secundorum consequi potest et maximum impulsum 100 chilioewtonum, quod prope impulsum unius machinae Boeing 737 est. la: Hodiernae nuntius consumptor: "Jaws" in continenti Sinis die 15 mensis Maii solvendus venturus est, et Starbucks Sinis "tantum Green" seriem co-notatam immittit. "Mandibula" in continenti Sinis dimissa die 15 mensis Maii. Die 30 Aprilis, Pictures universales confirmavit "Jaws" in continenti Sinis emissuri esse ante diem tertium Idus Maias XV. Hoc primum est quod hoc classicum thriller directum a Spielberg in theatris continenti solvetur, 51 annis post suum premium anno 1975. Dignum est memorare "Jaws" esse primum cinematographicum in cinematographico sub 100 decies centenario. Postrema eius arca cumulativa globali munere 476 decies centena US pervenit, eiusque sumptus tantum IX decies centena millia US fuit. Res magna fuit. Eodem tempore, ex ea, Hollywood aestate blockbuster incepit exemplar. title: 出動無人機大規模清查山域 屏縣里港警查獲現行犯3人、逃犯4人
description: 為淨化山域治安、防範製槍、植毒、製毒工廠藏匿山區，屏東縣政府警察局里港分局出動百餘警民力及無人機，針對轄內三地門、霧台鄉展開大規模清查、路檢勤務，3天共查獲涉嫌侵占、竊盜及毒品2人、酒後駕車1人、逃犯4人、逾期停留外籍移工1人。三地門鄉及霧台鄉緊鄰台東縣及高雄市，地處偏僻山林，易為不法分子藏匿活動，
en: Using drones to conduct large-scale inspections of mountainous areas, Ligang police in Ping County arrested 3 current criminals and 4 fugitives. In order to clean up public security in mountainous areas and prevent gun-making, drug-growing, and drug-making factories from hiding in mountainous areas, the Ligang Branch of the Pingtung County Government Police Department dispatched more than a hundred policemen and drones to carry out large-scale inspections and road inspections in Sandimen and Wutai Township within its jurisdiction. In three days, a total of 2 people suspected of embezzlement, theft and drugs, 1 drunk driver, 4 fugitives, and 1 overstayed foreign migrant worker were seized. Sandimen Township and Wutai Township are close to Taitung County and Kaohsiung City. They are located in remote mountains and forests, making it easy for criminals to hide their activities.

title: 工研院扶植新創公司「起而行綠能」布局東南亞 營收翻倍
description: 記者彭新茹／新竹報導 由工研院扶植成立的新創公司「起而行綠能」董事長簡金品指出，在全球電動車與能源轉型趨勢帶動下，積極調整國際布局，原本以美國為主的市場，將轉向東南亞發展，東南亞市場不僅是出海據點，更是檢驗產品價格帶與技術成熟度的重要舞台。 簡金品表示，公司企業核心願景係「建構合所有車輛、最安全的全方位充電解決位案」。不僅提供二輪、四輪到八輪的充電樁，更領先業界導入煙霧偵測與電動輛防火毯等安全配套，結所子公司「 壩 」的 AI 調控技術，提供企業「一站式購足」的綠色能源與防災解決位案。隨著去年底至今年初完成多項國…
en: ITRI-supported start-up company "Start and Go Green Energy" has doubled its revenue in Southeast Asia. Reporter Peng Xinru/Hsinchu Report Jian Jinpin, chairman of the new start-up company "Start and Go Green Energy" supported by ITRI, pointed out that driven by the global trend of electric vehicles and energy transformation, the international layout will be actively adjusted. The market originally dominated by the United States will turn to Southeast Asia for development. The Southeast Asian market is not only a stronghold for overseas expansion, but also an important stage for testing product price ranges and technological maturity. Jian Jinpin said that the company's core corporate vision is to "build the safest all-round charging solution for all vehicles." Not only does it provide two-wheel, four-wheel to eight-wheel charging piles, it is also the first in the industry to introduce safety features such as smoke detection and electric vehicle fire blankets. In conjunction with the AI ​​control technology of its subsidiary "Ba", it provides enterprises with "one-stop shopping" green energy and disaster prevention solutions. With the completion of a number of national projects from the end of last year to the beginning of...
la: ITRI-sustentans initium societatis "Start et Go Green Energy" vectigal suum in Asia Australi duplicavit. AUCTOR Peng Xinru/Hsinchu Report Jian Jinpin, praeses novae societatis initiorum "Start et Go Viridis Energy" ab ITRI suffultus, ostendit eiectum globalem flectere vehiculorum electricorum et transformationis industriae, quod layout internationalis actuose adaptetur. Forum primum ab Civitatibus Foederatis dominatum in Asiam Australem ad progressionem convertet. Mercatus Asiaticus Australis non solum arx est ad ultramarinas expansiones, sed etiam momenti gradus ad explorandas iugis fructus et maturitatem technologicam. Jian Jinpin dixit visionem societatis nuclei corporatum "tutissimum edificare solutionem omnium vehiculorum omnium circumcirca praecipiens." Non solum duos rotam, quattuor rotam ad strues octo-rotae incurrentes, primum etiam in industria ad salutem features introducendas ut fumus deprehensio et stragula ignis electrici vehiculum. In conjunctione cum AI technologiae suae subsidiariae "Ba" potestate, conatibus "one-stare shopping" praebet viridi energia et calamitatis solutiones praeventionis. Cum completis aliquot inceptis nationalibus a fine ultimo anno ad initium...

en: Latest/20:39 A 6.1-magnitude earthquake occurred in the eastern waters of Taiwan at 20:39. Real-time center/Liao Yuxuan reported that at around 8:39 pm today (5/1), a 6.1-magnitude earthquake occurred in the eastern waters of Taiwan. The epicenter was 38.7 kilometers northeast of the Yilan County Government. The depth of the earthquake was 98.3 kilometers. It was a medium-level earthquake that was clearly felt in both north and south. The maximum magnitude was 4.

title: 宜蘭6.1地震…台灣進入活躍地震期？郭鎧紋解析了：今年目前最強
description: 生活中心／巫旻璇報導今（1日）晚間8時39分，宜蘭外海發生芮氏規模6.1地震，震源深度98.3公里，震央位於宜蘭縣政府東北東方約38.7公里處，最大震度達4級。中央氣象署指出，該起地震屬於獨立事件，且為今年以來規模最大的一次，未來3天內不排除出現規模5至5.5的餘震。前中央氣象局地震測報中心主任郭鎧紋分析，這起地震是今年目前能量最強的一次，釋放規模約相當於0.7顆原子彈，屬於地殼正常釋放能量的現象。
en: Yilan 6.1 earthquake...Taiwan has entered an active earthquake period? Guo Kaiwen analyzed: The strongest so far this year. Life Center/Wu Minxuan reported that at 8:39 pm today (1st), a magnitude 6.1 earthquake occurred off the coast of Yilan, with a focal depth of 98.3 kilometers, and the epicenter was located about 38.7 kilometers northeast of the Yilan County Government. The maximum magnitude reached 4. The Central Meteorological Administration pointed out that the earthquake was an independent event and the largest this year. Aftershocks with a magnitude of 5 to 5.5 cannot be ruled out in the next three days. Guo Kaiwen, former director of the Earthquake Forecasting and Forecasting Center of the Central Meteorological Administration, analyzed that this earthquake was the most powerful one so far this year, with a release scale equivalent to about 0.7 atomic bombs. It was a normal release of energy from the earth's crust.

de: Das Erdbeben der Stärke 6,1 ist das stärkste in diesem Jahr. Ist Taiwan in eine aktive Phase eingetreten? Antwort von Guo Kaiwen. Am ersten Maitag erlebte Taiwan sein erstes starkes Erdbeben mit einer Stärke von über 6 in diesem Jahr. Das Erdbeben war in den beiden nördlichen Regionen deutlich zu spüren, und einige Menschen waren besorgt darüber, ob Taiwan in eine Phase aktiver Seismizität eintreten würde. Guo Kaiwen, Direktor des Earthquake Forecasting and Forecasting Center des Meteorological Bureau, erklärte auch, dass das Erdbeben ein Nachbeben des Erdbebens der Stärke 7,0 vom 27. Dezember letzten Jahres sei.
title: 6.1地震今年規模最大 台灣進入活躍期？郭鎧紋解答
description: 進入5月第一天，台灣就迎來今年第一個規模超過6的強震，雙北地區感受明顯，就有民眾擔心台灣是否將進入地震活躍期。對此前氣象局地震測報中心主任郭鎧紋也做出解釋，指出這起地震屬於去年12月27日規模7.0強震的餘震。
en: The 6.1 earthquake is the largest this year. Has Taiwan entered an active period? Answer from Guo Kaiwen. On the first day of May, Taiwan experienced its first strong earthquake with a magnitude exceeding 6 this year. The earthquake was clearly felt in the two northern regions, and some people were worried about whether Taiwan would enter a period of active seismicity. Guo Kaiwen, director of the Earthquake Forecasting and Forecasting Center of the Meteorological Bureau, also explained that the earthquake was an aftershock of the 7.0-magnitude earthquake on December 27 last year.

de: Das 6,1 starke Erdbeben am ersten Maitag war das stärkste in diesem Jahr! Tritt Taiwan in eine aktive Phase ein? Guo Kaiwen sprach. Heute (1.) um 20:39 Uhr ereignete sich in den nordöstlichen Gewässern Taiwans ein Erdbeben der Stärke 6,1 mit einer Fokustiefe von 98,3 Kilometern, das an vielen Orten in ganz Taiwan deutlich zu spüren war. In den nördlichen und östlichen Teilen des Landes kam es zu Erdbeben mit einer Stärke von 3 bis 4, und auch in Tainan, Kaohsiung und Pingtung im Süden kam es zu Erdbeben mit einer Stärke von 1 bis 2, was in der Öffentlichkeit Besorgnis darüber hervorrief, ob dort eine aktive seismische Periode eingetreten ist.
title: 5月首日6.1強震規模今年最大！台灣進入活躍期？郭鎧紋說話了
description: 今（1）日20時39分，台灣東北海域發生規模6.1地震，震源深度98.3公里，全台多地明顯有感。北部與東部震度達3至4級以上，南部台南、高雄、屏東亦出現1至2級震度，引發民眾對是否進入地震活躍期的關注。
la: 6.1 Terrae motus validus Kalendis Maiis hoc anno fuit maxima! Taiwan intrat tempus activum? Guo Kaiwen locutus est. Hodie (1st) ad 20:39, magnitudo 6.1 terrae motus in aquis septentrionalibus Taiwan factus est, cum arx profunditate 98.3 chiliometrorum facta est et multis in locis trans Taiwan clare sentitur. Partes septentrionales et orientales terrae experti sunt terrae motus cum magnitudinibus 3 ad 4, et terrae motus cum magnitudinibus 1 ad 2 etiam in Tainan, Kaohsiung, et Pingtung in australi parte, publicam sollicitudinem suscitantes utrum tempus seismicum activam ingressi fuerint.

title: 台灣東部海域10:29規模3.8地震 最大震度1級
description: 地牛翻身！根據中央氣象署地震報告，今（5日）上午10時29分，台灣東部海域發生芮氏規模3.8地震，位置為北緯 23.66度，東經 121.65度，即在花蓮縣政府南方 36.8 公里。地震深度35.1公里。花蓮縣地區最大震度1級。
en: A 3.8-magnitude earthquake occurred off the eastern coast of Taiwan at 10:29, with a maximum magnitude of 1. Earthquake turned over! According to the earthquake report of the Central Meteorological Administration, at 10:29 am today (5th), a magnitude 3.8 earthquake occurred in the eastern waters of Taiwan at 23.66 degrees north latitude and 121.65 degrees east longitude, which is 36.8 kilometers south of the Hualien County Government. la: 3.8-magnitudo terrae motus factus est in litore orientali Taiwan ante 10:29, cum maxima magnitudine 1. Terrae motui tradito! Secundum terrae motus relationem Centralis Meteorologicae Administrationis, 10:29 sum hodie (5th), magnitudo 3.8 terrae motus factus est in aquis orientalibus Taiwan ad 23.66 gradus latitudinis septentrionalis et 121,65 gradus longitudinis orientalis, quae est 36.8 chiliometrorum ad meridiem Provinciae Comitatus Hualien. Altitudo terrae motus 35.1 chiliometrorum fuit. Maxima magnitudo terrae motus in Comitatu Hualien fuit 1 .

la: 6.1 Terrae motus validus in area maris orientalis trans Taiwan sentiebatur! Taiwan seismic tempus activae est ingressus? Periti respondit. Secundum Administrationem Centralem Meteorologicam, magnitudo 6.1-terrae motus factus est heri 20:39. Epicenter in Taiwan mare orientalem fuit. Terrae motus altitude 98.3 chiliometrorum erat. Locus relativus erat 38.7 chiliometrorum septentrionalium Gubernii Comitatus Yilan. Sensus fere totus in Taiwan. Maximus intensio terrae motus fuit 4. Sita erat in Nan'ao, Comitatu Yilan, Guanxi, Comitatu Hsinchu, Hehuanshan, Comitatus Nantou, et Yanliao, Comitatu Hualien. title: 00：18台灣東部海域規模5.3地震 最大震度1級、10縣市有感
description: 地牛翻身！根據中央氣象署地震測報中心資料，今（4日）凌晨零時18分台灣東部海域發生芮氏規模5.3的小區域地震，震央在宜蘭縣政府東方144.5公里處，深度135.2公里，屬於中層地震。
en: 00:18 A 5.3-magnitude earthquake occurred in the eastern waters of Taiwan. The maximum magnitude was 1, and was felt in 10 counties and cities. What a surprise! According to data from the Earthquake Forecasting Center of the Central Meteorological Administration, a small area earthquake with a magnitude of 5.3 on the Richter scale occurred in the eastern waters of Taiwan at 0:18 a.m. today (the 4th). The epicenter was 144.5 kilometers east of Yilan County Government, with a depth of 135.2 kilometers. It was a medium-level earthquake.
la: 00:18 A 5.3 terraemotus magnus factus est in aquis orientalibus Taiwan. Maximae magnitudinis 1 erat, et in 10 comitatibus et urbibus sentiebatur. Quid mirum! Secundum notitias Terrae motus Praedictio Centri Administrationis Meteorologicae Centralis, parva area terraemotus cum magnitudine 5.3 in scala Richter facta est in aquis orientalibus Taiwan ad 0:18 a.m. hodie (4th). Epicenter erat 144.5 chiliometrorum orientalis Gubernii Comitatus Yilan cum profunditate 135,2 chiliometrorum. Terrae motus erat medius gradus.
content: 1/5Zepp New TaipeiPrince Of nothing

de: Um 0:18 Uhr morgens war in 10 Landkreisen und Städten ein Erdbeben der Stärke 5,3 zu spüren. Nach dem Erdbeben der Stärke 6,1 am 1. Mai kam es in den östlichen Meeren Taiwans weiterhin zu Erdbeben. Aus dem Erdbebenbericht der Central Meteorological Administration ging hervor, dass sich am 4. um 00:18 Uhr spät in der Nacht ein weiteres Erdbeben der Stärke 5,3 in den Ostmeeren ereignete. Glücklicherweise war die Tiefe tiefer und erreichte 135,2 Kilometer. Es handelte sich um ein Erdbeben mittlerer Stärke, das Epizentrum lag in Yilan.
title: 凌晨0：18規模5.3地震 10縣市有感
description: 5/1發生規模6.1地震後，台灣東部海域持續有地震發生，中央氣象署地震報告顯示，今（4）日深夜00:18，東部海域再出現一起規模5.3地震，所幸深度較深，來到135.2公里，屬於中層地震，震央則在宜蘭
en: At 0:18 in the morning, a magnitude 5.3 earthquake was felt in 10 counties and cities. After the magnitude 6.1 earthquake occurred on May 1, earthquakes continued to occur in the eastern seas of Taiwan. The earthquake report of the Central Meteorological Administration showed that at 00:18 late at night on the 4th, another magnitude 5.3 earthquake occurred in the eastern seas. Fortunately, the depth was deeper, reaching 135.2 kilometers. It was a mid-level earthquake, and the epicenter was in Yilan.
la: Hora 0:18 mane, magnitudo 5.3 terrae motus in centum comitatus et civitates perceptus est. Post magnitudinem 6.1 terrae motus factus Idibus Maiis, terrae motus fiebant in mari orientali Taiwan. Renuntiatio terrae motus Centralis Administrationis Meteorologicae ostendit se hora 00:18 in multam noctem die 4, aliam magnitudinem 5.3 terrae motus in mari orientali factam. Fortunate profundior erat profunditas chiliometrorum 135,2. Terraemotus fuit medium planum, et epicenter fuit in Yilan.

title: 新／日本沖繩規模4.2地震 震央離台灣超近
description: 日本今（5）日當地時間15時58分（台灣時間14時58分），沖繩西表島附近發生規模4.2地震，震原深度僅10公里，沖繩縣竹富町最大震度2、沖繩縣石垣市最大震度1，並無海嘯疑慮。 【本文由東森新聞提供，未經授權，請勿轉載！】
en: New/Japanese Okinawa earthquake with a magnitude of 4.2, the epicenter is very close to Taiwan. At 15:58 local time in Japan today (5th) (14:58 Taiwan time), a magnitude 4.2 earthquake occurred near Iriomote Island, Okinawa. The depth of the earthquake source was only 10 kilometers. The maximum magnitude of the earthquake was 2 in Taketomi Town, Okinawa Prefecture, and the maximum magnitude 1 in Ishigaki City, Okinawa Prefecture. There were no concerns about tsunami. la: Novus/Iaponica Okinawa terraemotus cum magnitudine 4.2, epicenter Taiwan proximus est. de: Nachrichten „Ein Erdbeben der Stärke 6,1 am Abend vor der Küste von Yilan. Die maximale Stärke des Erdbebens in Yilan betrug 4, und der Warnbereich von Shuangbeitao Gilead wurde erreicht. [Newtalk News] Heute Abend um 8:39:55 Uhr ereignete sich in den östlichen Gewässern Taiwans ein Erdbeben der Stärke 6,1. Das Epizentrum befand sich 38,7 Kilometer nordöstlich der Bezirksregierung Yilan in den östlichen Gewässern Taiwans, mit einer Tiefe von 98,3 Kilometern. Die maximale Stärke des Erdbebens lag im Landkreis Yilan und war auch an vielen Orten im Norden Taiwans deutlich zu spüren. Den Echtzeit-Seismikdaten des seismischen Vorhersagenetzwerks der Central Meteorological Administration zufolge war dieses Erdbeben das größte gefühlte Erdbeben der Stärke 4, wobei Nan'ao und Nanshan die Stärke 4 erreichten 3 Erdbeben, Toucheng-Stärke 2 und Guishan-Insel-Stärke 1. Als das Erdbeben auftrat, verspürten die Menschen in Taipeh, Neu-Taipeh, Keelung, Taoyuan, Yilan und anderen Orten deutliche Erschütterungen. Viele Menschen sagten, dass die Erschütterungen in höheren Stockwerken stärker seien.
title: 快訊》宜蘭外海晚間規模6.1地震 宜蘭最大震度4級、雙北桃基列警戒範圍
description: [Newtalk新聞] 今晚8時39分55秒，台灣東部海域發生芮氏規模6.1有感地震，震央位於宜蘭縣政府東北東方38.7公里、台灣東部海域，地震深度98.3公里。宜蘭縣地區最大震度達4級，北台灣多地也明顯有感。 根據中央氣象署地震測報網即時地震資料，本起地震為第037號顯著有感地震，宜蘭縣最大震度4級，其中南澳、南山達4級；宜蘭市、蘇澳、內城、冬山、牛鬥、大同等地震度3級，頭城2級，龜山島1級。 地震發生時，台北、新北、基隆、桃園及宜蘭等地民眾均感受到明顯搖晃，不少人表示高樓層晃動感較強。氣象署提醒，民眾應留意後…
